---
title: "Example Projects"
---

We have prepared several scenarios that you can attempt to code for yourself throughout the workshop:

- **Multimodal Met Museum Semantic Networks (`projects/archival-collections`):** Connects artworks from the Metropolitan Museum of Art Open Access API to their shared semantic concepts (extracted using Gemini) into an interactive network visualization.
- **Geospatial Data Vibe Visualizing (`projects/geo-viz`):** An exploratory analysis using geospatial data in R to visualize and overlay 19th-century wildfires against other relevant records.
- **Computing the bikability of the Santa Barbara County (`projects/bikability`):** Computes the steepness of Santa Barbara County using a Digital Elevation Model (DEM) and US Census Group Blocks to create a map showing the median slope of each area.
- **Analyzing Public Comments from regulations.gov (`projects/regulations-comments`):** Analyzes public comments downloaded from regulations.gov to extract research findings and insights.
- **COVID-19 fatality rates (`projects/covid-fatality-rates`):** Analyzes US County-level COVID-19 cases data to provide general description and key statistics of Covid-19 fatality rates.
